summary: Iteration 37 frontend testing completed successfully. All requested polish items verified: Legal Glossary compact/expanded view toggle works correctly (compact mode default, 2-column dense grid, expand/collapse for term details); Landing page mini back-to-top controls appear between all 5 long sections and button scrolls to top; No regressions in header dropdowns (Resources/Learn/About) or footer links; FAQ page compact readability intact with accordion functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: LegalGlossary.jsx lines 716-739: Compact/Expanded view toggle implemented with data-testid attributes (glossary-density-compact, glossary-density-expanded)
LegalGlossary.jsx line 588: viewDensity state defaults to 'compact' mode
LegalGlossary.jsx line 799: Terms list uses 2-column grid in compact mode (xl:grid-cols-2) vs single column space-y-4 in expanded
LandingPage.jsx lines 1807-1818: SectionBackToTop component defined with ArrowUp icon and 'Back to top' text
LandingPage.jsx lines 314, 426, 691, 1503, 1588: Five SectionBackToTop placements between major sections
LandingPage.jsx line 22: scrollToTop function uses smooth scrolling
FAQPage.jsx: Compact readability maintained with accordion expand/collapse (lines 393-428)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 verified all UI polish items: 1) Legal Glossary has compact/expanded toggle - compact mode shows denser 2-column grid with 84 terms, expanded shows single column; both modes preserve expand/collapse for term details and examples; 2) Landing page has 5 back-to-top mini controls between sections (after hero, experience, resources, pricing, about) with ArrowUp icon and smooth scroll; 3) Header dropdowns (Resources/Learn/About) fully functional with all footer links included in Resources dropdown; 4) FAQ page accordion and compact readability stable.

legal_glossary.expanded_mode_layout: PASS - space-y-4 single column in expanded mode
